mapper.sql: a.id, a.user_id AS "userId", a.type, a.log_date AS "logDate", a.title, a.remote_addr AS "remoteAddr", a.user_agent AS "userAgent", a.method, a.request_uri AS "requestUri", a.request_params AS "requestParams"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_log(id, user_id, type, log_date, title, remote_addr, user_agent, method, request_uri, request_params) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{logDate}, #{title}, #{remoteAddr}, #{userAgent}, #{method}, #{requestUri}, #{requestParams})

INSERT INTO sys_log(id, user_id, type, log_date, title, remote_addr, user_agent, method, request_uri, request_params)
SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.logDate}, #{item.title}, #{item.remoteAddr}, #{item.userAgent}, #{item.method}, #{item.requestUri}, #{item.requestParams} FROM dual
